summary: Verified ecosystem section restoration after DB reseed. All 6 ecosystem cards (express, food, mart, shop, auto, immo) render in correct order with wordmark logos, descriptions, illustrations, and colored circular arrows. Regression checks all green: header uses /logos/baked-header.png, hero loads, footer has 2 baked-header.png logos, MobileShowcase carousel still has exactly 4 dots (phone-dot-0..3, no phone-dot-4), language switcher toggles FR↔EN correctly on the ecosystem heading (FR: 'L'ÉCOSYSTÈME / UNE SEULE APP, DE NOMBREUX SERVICES' <-> EN: 'THE ECOSYSTEM / ONE APP, MANY SERVICES'), and admin login (admin@baked.group / BakedAdmin2025!) succeeds and shows the dashboard with 6 Applications stat.
critical_code_review_comments: Ecosystem.tsx + page.tsx server fetch correctly returns 6 enabled apps ordered by order field; DOM order on the rendered page matched the expected order exactly.
Each card renders the wordmark from /logos/{slug}.jpeg, an unsplash illustration, FR/EN description text, and an inline SVG arrow at the bottom.
No regression observed: header logo /logos/baked-header.png present, footer giant logo present, MobileShowcase has 4 screens only, language switcher functions, admin authentication works.
seed_data_creation: None this iteration. The user already ran `yarn db:seed` to repopulate the Application table after a container reset. Verified via psql that all 6 rows are present.

test_results_detail.fr_ecosystem_heading: L'ÉCOSYSTÈME / UNE SEULE APP, DE NOMBREUX SERVICES
test_results_detail.en_ecosystem_heading: THE ECOSYSTEM / ONE APP, MANY SERVICES

context_for_next_testing_agent: Postgres + Next.js are already up; DB has 6 Application rows. If the ecosystem section ever goes empty again, first check `sudo -u postgres psql -d baked_growth -c 'SELECT slug FROM "Application" ORDER BY "order";'` - if it returns 0 rows the container was reset; re-run `yarn db:seed` from /app/frontend. Public site testids confirmed: ecosystem-section, ecosystem-card-{express|food|mart|shop|auto|immo}, lang-button, lang-option-{en|fr}, phone-frame, phone-dot-0..3.
